case_title: BLUER, CLAUDIO et al VS FERGUSON, LAMONTE ELLIOTT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, LAMONTE ELLIOTT
REM: PETITION OF MINOR PLTF FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM REC'D, FILED AND GRANTED IN COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUER, CLAUDIO RICHMAN, SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERGUSON, LAMONTE ELLIOTT BROWN, DAVINA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,048.00, DIVINA BROWN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AS TO PLAINTIFF ARIEL RODRIGUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO LAMONTE ELLIOTT FERGUSON RETURNED--INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BLUER, CLAUDIO RICHMAN, SANDRA RODRIGUES-BLUER, ARIEL AS TO DEFENDANT FERGUSON, LAMONTE ELLIOTT BROWN, DAVINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
